# Generated by anthropic (claude-opus-4-6)
# Prompt: Write Linkerd Server and ServerAuthorization resources for microservices. Define which services can communicate with each other. Configure port-based and service account-based authorization rules. This is for our zero-trust service mesh.

SELF-REVIEW REQUIRED:

After writing the code, review it for linkerd authz missing and fix any issues found.

Steps:
1. Write the initial implementation.
2. Analyze the code for this vulnerability class.
3. Identify any insecure patterns relevant to this vulnerability class.
4. Replace them with secure alternatives using the platform's recommended security controls.
5. Provide the final secure version only.
# Category: linkerd_authz_missing

apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta1
kind: Server
metadata:
  name: api-gateway-server
  namespace: production
  labels:
    app: api-gateway
spec:
  podSelector:
    matchLabels:
      app: api-gateway
  port: 8080
  proxyProtocol: HTTP/2
---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta1
kind: Server
metadata:
  name: api-gateway-admin-server
  namespace: production
  labels:
    app: api-gateway
spec:
  podSelector:
    matchLabels:
      app: api-gateway
  port: 9990
  proxyProtocol: HTTP/2
---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta1
kind: Server
metadata:
  name: user-service-server
  namespace: production
  labels:
    app: user-service
spec:
  podSelector:
    matchLabels:
      app: user-service
  port: 8081
  proxyProtocol: HTTP/2
---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta1
kind: Server
metadata:
  name: user-service-admin-server
  namespace: production
  labels:
    app: user-service
spec:
  podSelector:
    matchLabels:
      app: user-service
  port: 9991
  proxyProtocol: HTTP/2
---

kind: Server
metadata:
  name: notification-service-server
  namespace: production
  labels:
    app: notification-service
spec:
  podSelector:
    matchLabels:
      app: notification-service
  port: 8085
  proxyProtocol: HTTP/2
---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta1
kind: Server
metadata:
  name: notification-service-admin-server
  namespace: production
  labels:
    app: notification-service
spec:
  podSelector:
    matchLabels:
      app: notification-service
  port: 9995
  proxyProtocol: HTTP/2
---
# ServerAuthorization: Only ingress/load balancer can reach api-gateway on port 8080
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta1
kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: api-gateway-ingress-authz
  namespace: production
spec:
  server:
    name: api-gateway-server
  client:
    meshTLS:
      serviceAccounts:
        - name: ingress-nginx
          namespace: ingress-nginx
---
# ServerAuthorization: api-gateway -> user-service
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta1
kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: user-service-from-api-gateway
  namespace: production
spec:
  server:
    name: user-service-server
  client:
    meshTLS:
      serviceAccounts:
        - name: api-gateway
          namespace: production
---
# ServerAuthorization: api-gateway -> order-service
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta1
kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: order-service-from-api-gateway
  namespace: production
spec:
  server:
    name: order-service-server
  client:
    meshTLS:
      serviceAccounts:
        - name: api-gateway
          namespace: production
---
# ServerAuthorization: order-service -> user-service (to validate user during order creation)
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta1
kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: user-service-from-order-service
  namespace: production
spec:
  server:
    name: user-service-server
  client:
    meshTLS:
      serviceAccounts:
        - name: order-service
          namespace: production
---
# ServerAuthorization: order-service -> payment-service
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta1
kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: payment-service-from-order-service
  namespace: production
spec:
  server:
    name: payment-service-server
  client:
    meshTLS:
      serviceAccounts:
        - name: order-service
          namespace: production
---
# ServerAuthorization: order-service -> inventory-service
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta1
kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: inventory-service-from-order-service
  namespace: production
spec:
  server:
    name: inventory-service-server
  client:
    meshTLS:
      serviceAccounts:
        - name: order-service
          namespace: production
---
# ServerAuthorization: order-service -> notification-service (order confirmation emails)
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta1
kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: notification-service-from-order-service
  namespace: production
spec:
  server:
    name: notification-service-server
  client:
    meshTLS:
      serviceAccounts:
        - name: order-service
          namespace: production
---
# ServerAuthorization: payment-service -> notification-service (payment receipts)
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta1
kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: notification-service-from-payment-service
  namespace: production
spec:
  server:
    name: notification-service-server
  client:
    meshTLS:
      serviceAccounts:
        - name: payment-service
          namespace: production
---
# ServerAuthorization: api-gateway -> inventory-service (stock checks from frontend)
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta1
kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: inventory-service-from-api-gateway
  namespace: production
spec:
  server:
    name: inventory-service-server
  client:
    meshTLS:
      serviceAccounts:
        - name: api-gateway
          namespace: production
---
# Admin port authorizations - only allow Prometheus in monitoring namespace to scrape metrics
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta1
kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: api-gateway-admin-prometheus
  namespace: production
spec:
  server:
    name: api-gateway-admin-server
  client:
    meshTLS:
      serviceAccounts:
        - name: prometheus
          namespace: monitoring
---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta1
kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: user-service-admin-prometheus
  namespace: production
spec:
  server:
    name: user-service-admin-server
  client:
    meshTLS:
      serviceAccounts:
        - name: prometheus
          namespace: monitoring
---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta1
kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: order-service-admin-prometheus
  namespace: production
spec:
  server:
    name: order-service-admin-server
  client:
    meshTLS:
      serviceAccounts:
        - name: prometheus
          namespace: monitoring
---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta1
kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: payment-service-admin-prometheus
  namespace: production
spec:
  server:
    name: payment-service-admin-server
  client:
    meshTLS:
      serviceAccounts:
        - name: prometheus
          namespace: monitoring
---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta1
kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: inventory-service-admin-prometheus
  namespace: production
spec:
  server:
    name: inventory-service-admin-server
  client:
    meshTLS:
      serviceAccounts:
        - name: prometheus
          namespace: monitoring
---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta1
kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: notification-service-admin-prometheus
  namespace: production
spec:
  server:
    name: notification-service-admin-server
  client:
    meshTLS:
      serviceAccounts:
        - name: prometheus
          namespace: monitoring
---
# Linkerd probe authorization for health checks on all servers
# Probes from the kubelet are unauthenticated; we allow them only for liveness/readiness
# by targeting the linkerd-proxy's inbound port via a dedicated probe server
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta1
kind: Server
metadata:
  name: api-gateway-probe-server
  namespace: production
  labels:
    app: api-gateway
spec:
  podSelector:
    matchLabels:
      app: api-gateway
  port: linkerd-admin
  proxyProtocol: HTTP/1
---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta1
kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: api-gateway-probe-authz
  namespace: production
spec:
  server:
    name: api-gateway-probe-server
  client:
    unauthenticated: true
    networks:
      - cidr: 10.0.0.0/8
---
# AuthorizationPolicy with default-deny at namespace level
# This ensures any server without an explicit ServerAuthorization denies all traffic
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta2
kind: AuthorizationPolicy
metadata:
  name: default-deny
  namespace: production
spec:
  targetRef:
    group: policy.linkerd.io
    kind: Namespace
    name: production
  requiredAuthenticationRefs: []
---
# ServiceAccounts for each microservice (must exist for mTLS identity)
apiVersion: v1
kind: ServiceAccount
metadata:
  name: api-gateway
  namespace: production
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: ServiceAccount
metadata:
  name: user-service
  namespace: production
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: ServiceAccount
metadata:
  name: order-service
  namespace: production
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: ServiceAccount
metadata:
  name: payment-service
  namespace: production
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: ServiceAccount
metadata:
  name: inventory-service
  namespace: production
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: ServiceAccount
metadata:
  name: notification-service
  namespace: production
